package rulecoverage

func NegativeGlobalRandSourceContention() string {
    ruleID := "global_rand_source_contention"
    family := "security"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`math/rand.Intn()`, `rand.Float64()`, etc. (global source) in hot handler or goroutine paths"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
